= \"self-modification\"\n76\t    MONITORING_CONFIG = \"monitoring-config\"\n77\t    TASK_PROFILE = \"task-profile\"  # Escalate to NEEDLE bead\n78\t    CLARIFICATION = \"clarification\"  # Needs user input\n79\t    STUCK = \"stuck\"  # Stuck intent - task blocked by circuit breaker\n80\t\n81\t\n82\t@dataclass\n83\tclass IntentClassification:\n84\t    \"\"\"Result of intent classification.\"\"\"\n85\t    intent_type: IntentType\n86\t    project_slug: str | None = None\n87\t    confidence: float = 1.0\n88\t    utterance_fragment: str = \"\"\n89\t    reasoning: str = \"\"\n90\t    urgency: str = \"normal\"  # critical, high, normal, low\n91\t    lookup_kind: str | None = None  # lookup intents only: 'logs' | 'config' | 'docs'\n92\t\n93\t\n94\t@dataclass\n95\tclass RoutedIntent:\n96\t    \"\"\"A routed intent ready for processing.\"\"\"\n97\t    intent_id: str\n98\t    classification: IntentClassification\n99\t    session_id: str\n100\t    utterance: str\n101\t    # router_ms is measured once around classify_utterance() in route_utterance\n102\t    # (one LLM call per utterance) and shared across every intent thread from\n103\t    # that utterance — see Latency Budget & Instrumentation in docs/plan/plan.md.\n104\t    router_ms: int | None = None\n105\t\n106\t\n107\t# Path to the router segmentation prompt. Read from disk on each classify_utterance()\n108\t# call so edits to prompts/router.md take effect without a server restart (hot-reload),\n109\t# matching the pattern in src/synthesize/strand.py (SYNTHESIZE_PROMPT_PATH).\n110\tROUTER_PROMPT_PATH = Path(\"/home/coding/aide-de-camp/prompts/router.md\")\n111\t\n112\t# Fallback used only if the prompt file cannot be read at runtime.\n113\t_ROUTER_PROMPT_FALLBACK = (\n114\t    \"You are the Intent Router for aide-de-camp. Segment the utterance into \"\n115\t    \"distinct intent threads, classify each, and return ONLY a JSON array of \"\n116\t    \"intent objects.\"\n117\t)\n118\t\n119\t\n120\t# Simple LRU cache for router classifications (reduces redundant LLM calls)\n121\tclass RouterCache:\n122\t    \"\"\"LRU cache for intent classification results.\"\"\"\n123\t\n124\t    def __init__(self, max_size: int = 100):\n125\t        self.cache: OrderedDict = OrderedDict()\n126\t        self.max_size = max_size\n127\t        self.hits = 0\n128\t        self.misses = 0\n129\t\n130\t    def _make_key(self, utterance: str, session_id: str) -> str:\n131\t        \"\"\"Create cache key from utterance and session context.\"\"\"\n132\t        # Normalize utterance for cache key (lowercase, strip extra whitespace)\n133\t        normalized = \" \".join(utterance.lower().split())\n134\t        return f\"{session_id}:{normalized}\"\n135\t\n136\t    def get(self, utterance: str, session_id: str) -> Optional[list[IntentClassification]]:\n137\t        \"\"\"Get cached classification if available.\"\"\"\n138\t        key = self._make_key(utterance, session_id)\n139\t        if key in self.cache:\n140\t            # Move to end (most recently used)\n141\t            self.cache.move_to_end(key)\n142\t            self.hits += 1\n143\t            return self.cache[key]\n144\t        self.misses += 1\n145\t        return None\n146\t\n147\t    def put(self, utterance: str, session_id: str, classifications: list[IntentClassification]) -> None:\n148\t        \"\"\"Cache classification result.\"\"\"\n149\t        key = self._make_key(utterance, session_id)\n150\t        self.cache[key] = classifications\n151\t        self.cache.move_to_end(key)\n152\t\n153\t        # Evict oldest if over capacity\n154\t        if len(self.cache) > self.max_size:\n155\t            self.cache.popitem(last=False)\n156\t\n157\t    def invalidate(self, session_id: str) -> None:\n158\t        \"\"\"Invalidate all cache entries for a session.\"\"\"\n159\t        keys_to_delete = [k for k in self.cache if k.startswith(f\"{session_id}:\")]\n160\t        for key in keys_to_delete:\n161\t            del self.cache[key]\n162\t\n163\t    def get_stats(self) -> dict:\n164\t        \"\"\"Get cache statistics.\"\"\"\n165\t        total = self.hits + self.misses\n166\t        hit_rate = self.hits / total if total > 0 else 0\n167\t        return {\n168\t            \"size\": len(self.cache),\n169\t            \"hits\": self.hits,\n170\t            \"misses\": self.misses,\n171\t            \"hit_rate\": hit_rate,\n172\t        }\n173\t\n174\t\n175\t# Global cache instance\n176\t_router_cache: Optional[RouterCache] = None\n177\t\n178\t\n179\tdef get_router_cache() -> RouterCache:\n180\t    \"\"\"Get or create the global router cache instance.\"\"\"\n181\t    global _router_cache\n182\t    if _router_cache is None:\n183\t        _router_cache = RouterCache(max_size=100)\n184\t    return _router_cache\n185\t\n186\t\n187\t# Simple heuristic patterns for fast-path routing\n188\tclass FastPathRouter:\n189\t    \"\"\"\n190\t    Fast-path heuristic router for common patterns.\n191\t\n192\t    Bypasses LLM for straightforward utterances, reducing latency from ~2s to ~5ms.\n193\t    \"\"\"\n194\t\n195\t    # Common project slug patterns\n196\t    PROJECT_PATTERNS = {\n197\t        \"pbx\": [\"pbx\", \"pbx-web\", \"pbx web\", \"phone system\"],\n198\t        \"whisper\": [\"whisper\", \"whisper-stt\", \"whisper stt\", \"speech to text\", \"stt\"],\n199\t        \"pipeline\": [\"pipeline\", \"options-pipeline\", \"kalshi pipeline\"],\n200\t        \"domain\": [\"domain\", \"domain-check\", \"domain check\"],\n201\t        \"mta\": [\"mta\", \"mta-my-way\", \"subway\"],\n202\t        \"armor\": [\"armor\", \"armord\"],\n203\t        \"vista\": [\"vista\"],\n204\t        \"clasp\": [\"clasp\"],\n205\t        \"sigil\": [\"sigil\"],\n206\t        \"forge\": [\"forge\"],\n207\t        \"needle\": [\"needle\", \"bead\", \"beads\", \"br\"],\n208\t        \"agent\": [\"agent\", \"bot\", \"agents\"],\n209\t        \"duck\": [\"duck\", \"duck-e\", \"duc\"],\n210\t        \"claud\": [\"claude\", \"claude-code\"],\n211\t        \"spaxel\": [\"spaxel\"],\n212\t        \"kalshi\": [\"kalshi\", \"kalshi-tape\", \"kalshi weather\"],\n213\t        \"ardenone\": [\"ardenone\", \"ardenone-cluster\", \"cluster\"],\n214\t        \"apexalgo\": [\"apexalgo\", \"apexalgo-iad\"],\n215\t        \"rs-manager\": [\"rs-manager\"],\n216\t    }\n217\t\n218\t    # Intent type patterns\n219\t    INTENT_PATTERNS = {\n220\t        IntentType.STATUS: [\n221\t            \"status\", \"state\", \"current\", \"running\", \"healthy\", \"up\", \"down\",\n222\t            \"what's\", \"what is\", \"how\", \"check\", \"show\", \"get\", \"list\",\n223\t            \"are the\", \"is the\", \"do we have\", \"can you see\", \"tell me\"\n224\t        ],\n225\t        IntentType.LOOKUP: [\n226\t            \"logs\", \"log output\", \"error\", \"find\", \"search\", \"lookup\", \"config\",\n227\t            \"configuration\", \"setting\", \"where\", \"pull up\", \"show me\", \"get the\",\n228\t            \"recent\", \"latest\", \"output\", \"trace\"\n229\t        ],\n230\t        IntentType.BRAINSTORM: [\n231\t            \"brainstorm\", \"explore\", \"think about\", \"ideas\", \"options\", \"suggest\",\n232\t            \"improvements\", \"design\", \"architecture\", \"consider\", \"what if\"\n233\t        ],\n234\t        IntentType.ACTION: [\n235\t            \"deploy\", \"restart\", \"create\", \"delete\", \"update\", \"apply\", \"run\",\n236\t            \"execute\", \"start\", \"stop\", \"scale\", \"build\", \"install\"\n237\t        ],\n238\t    }\n239\t\n240\t    @classmethod\n241\t    def try_fast_path(\n242\t        cls,\n243\t        utterance: str,\n244\t        session_id: str,\n245\t    ) -> list[IntentClassification] | None:\n246\t        \"\"\"\n247\t        Attempt fast-path classification using heuristics.\n248\t\n249\t        Returns None if fast-path fails, falling back to LLM.\n250\t        \"\"\"\n251\t        utterance_lower = utterance.lower()\n252\t\n253\t        # Fast-path only works for simple, clear utterances\n254\t        # Skip if:\n255\t        # - Multiple sentences (likely multi-intent)\n256\t        # - Too long (>200 chars)\n257\t        # - Contains ambiguous phrases\n258\t        if len(utterance) > 200:\n259\t            return None\n260\t\n261\t        if \".\" in utterance and utterance.count(\".\") > 1:\n262\t            return None\n263\t\n264\t        # Detect multi-intent patterns\n265\t        multi_intent_markers = [\" and \", \" & \", \" plus \", \" also \", \" as well as \"]\n266\t        for marker in multi_intent_markers:\n267\t            if marker in utterance_lower:\n268\t                return None  # Multi-intent - let LLM handle it\n269\t\n270\t        # Detect project slug\n271\t        project_slug = None\n272\t        for slug, patterns in cls.PROJECT_PATTERNS.items():\n273\t            for pattern in patterns:\n274\t                if pattern in utterance_lower:\n275\t                    project_slug = slug\n276\t                    break\n277\t            if project_slug:\n278\t                break\n279\t\n280\t        # Detect intent type\n281\t        intent_type = None\n282\t        lookup_kind = None\n283\t\n284\t        for intent, patterns in cls.INTENT_PATTERNS.items():\n285\t            for pattern in patterns:\n286\t                if pattern in utterance_lower:\n287\t                    intent_type = intent\n288\t\n289\t                    # Special handling for lookup intents\n290\t                    if intent_type == IntentType.LOOKUP:\n291\t                        if \"log\" in utterance_lower:\n292\t                            lookup_kind = \"logs\"\n293\t                        elif \"config\" in utterance_lower or \"setting\" in utterance_lower:\n294\t                            lookup_kind = \"config\"\n295\t                        else:\n296\t                            lookup_kind = \"docs\"\n297\t                    break\n298\t            if intent_type:\n299\t                break\n300\t\n301\t        # Default to STATUS if no clear intent detected\n302\t        if intent_type is None:\n303\t            intent_type = IntentType.STATUS\n304\t\n305\t        # Create classification\n306\t        classification = IntentClassification(\n307\t            intent_type=intent_type,\n308\t            project_slug=project_slug,\n309\t            confidence=0.85,  # Lower confidence for heuristic\n310\t            utterance_fragment=utterance,\n311\t            reasoning=\"Fast-path heuristic classification\",\n312\t            urgency=\"normal\",\n313\t            lookup_kind=lookup_kind,\n314\t        )\n315\t\n316\t        return [classification]\n317\t\n318\t\n319\tdef get_fast_path_router() -> FastPathRouter:\n320\t    \"\"\"Get the fast-path router instance (singleton).\"\"\"\n321\t    return FastPathRouter\n322\t\n323\t\n324\tclass IntentRouter:\n325\t    \"\"\"\n326\t    Intent Router classifies utterances and routes to appropriate strands.\n327\t\n328\t    For task-profile intents, routes to escalate strand for bead creation.\n329\t    For other intents, routes to fetch + synthesize strands (TODO).\n330\t    \"\"\"\n331\t\n332\t    def __init__(self, store=None, prompt_path: Optional[Path] = None):\n333\t        self.store = store\n334\t        self.prompt_path = prompt_path or ROUTER_PROMPT_PATH\n335\t        self._zai_client = None\n336\t        self._reload_manager = None\n337\t        self._system_prompt_cache: str | None = None\n338\t        self._system_prompt_mtime: float = 0\n339\t\n340\t    async def _get_zai_client(self):\n341\t        \"\"\"Get or create ZAI client with optimized timeout for routing.\"\"\"\n342\t        if self._zai_client is None:\n343\t            # Use shorter timeout for routing (8s instead of 30s default)\n344\t            # Router classification should be fast with Haiku model\n345\t            # Reduced from 10s to meet ~500ms budget more aggressively\n346\t            from ..escalate.llm import ZAIClient\n347\t            self._zai_client = ZAIClient(timeout=8.0)\n348\t        return self._zai_client\n349\t\n350\t    async def _get_store(self):\n351\t        \"\"\"Get or create session store.\"\"\"\n352\t        if self.store is None:\n353\t            self.store = get_store()\n354\t        return self.store\n355\t\n356\t    def _get_reload_manager(self):\n357\t        \"\"\"Get or create the hot-reload manager (lazy singleton).\"\"\"\n358\t        if self._reload_manager is None:\n359\t            self._reload_manager = get_reload_manager()\n360\t        return self._reload_manager\n361\t\n362\t    def _load_router_prompt(self) -> str:\n363\t        \"\"\"Load the router segmentation prompt from disk (hot-reload, per call).\"\"\"\n364\t        try:\n365\t            return self.prompt_path.read_text()\n366\t        except Exception as e:\n367\t            logger.error(f\"Failed to load router prompt from {self.prompt_path}: {e}\")\n368\t            return _ROUTER_PROMPT_FALLBACK\n369\t\n370\t    def _load_urgency_prompt(self) -> str:\n371\t        \"\"\"\n372\t        Load the urgency classification prompt from disk via the hot-reload manager.\n373\t\n374\t        prompts/urgency.md is a separately hot-reloadable artifact (registered in\n375\t        src/components/hot_reload.py). Splicing it here keeps urgency guidance\n376\t        editable independently of the segmentation prompt. Returns \"\" on failure\n377\t        so the router still functions without urgency guidance.\n378\t        \"\"\"\n379\t        try:\n380\t            return self._get_reload_manager().get_prompt(\"urgency\")\n381\t        except Exception as e:\n382\t            logger.warning(f\"Failed to load urgency prompt: {e}\")\n383\t            return \"\"\n384\t\n385\t    def _build_system_prompt(self, force_reload: bool = False) -> str:\n386\t        \"\"\"\n387\t        Build the full system prompt: segmentation prompt + urgency rules.\n388\t\n389\t        Uses cache to avoid disk I/O on every call. Only reloads when the prompt\n390\t        file changes (based on mtime) or when force_reload=True.\n391\t        \"\"\"\n392\t        # Check if we need to reload (file modified or cache empty)\n393\t        try:\n394\t            current_mtime = self.prompt_path.stat().st_mtime\n395\t            if not force_reload and self._system_prompt_cache is not None and current_mtime == self._system_prompt_mtime:\n396\t                # Cache is valid, return cached prompt\n397\t                return self._system_prompt_cache\n398\t        except OSError:\n399\t            # File doesn't exist or can't be accessed\n400\t            pass\n401\t\n402\t        # Need to rebuild the prompt\n403\t        system_prompt = self._load_router_prompt()\n404\t        urgency_prompt = self._load_urgency_prompt()\n405\t        if urgency_prompt:\n406\t            system_prompt = (\n407\t                f\"{system_prompt}\\n\\n## Urgency Classification Rules\\n\\n{urgency_prompt}\"\n408\t            )\n409\t\n410\t        # Update cache\n411\t        self._system_prompt_cache = system_prompt\n412\t        try:\n413\t            self._system_prompt_mtime = self.prompt_path.stat().st_mtime\n414\t        except OSError:\n415\t            self._system_prompt_mtime = 0\n416\t\n417\t        return system_prompt\n418\t\n419\t    async def classify_utterance(\n420\t        self,\n421\t        utterance: str,\n422\t        session_id: str,\n423\t        retry_on_malformed: bool = True,\n424\t        use_cache: bool = True,\n425\t    ) -> list[IntentClassification]:\n426\t        \"\"\"\n427\t        Classify an utterance into intents.\n428\t\n429\t        Uses LLM to segment and classify the utterance.\n430\t\n431\t        Args:\n432\t            utterance: The user utterance\n433\t            session_id: Session ID for context\n434\t            retry_on_malformed: If True, perform one corrective retry on JSON parse failure\n435\t            use_cache: If True, check cache before LLM call\n436\t\n437\t        Returns:\n438\t            List of IntentClassification objects\n439\t\n440\t        Raises:\n441\t            RouterTimeoutError: LLM call timed out\n442\t            RouterQuotaError: LLM quota exhausted\n443\t            RouterProxyError: LLM proxy unreachable\n444\t            RouterMalformedError: Malformed JSON after corrective retry\n445\t        \"\"\"\n446\t        classify_start = time.monotonic()\n447\t\n448\t        # Check cache first (unless disabled)\n449\t        if use_cache:\n450\t            cache = get_router_cache()\n451\t            cached_result = cache.get(utterance, session_id)\n452\t            if cached_result is not None:\n453\t                cache_ms = int((time.monotonic() - classify_start) * 1000)\n454\t                logger.info(f\"Router cache hit for session {session_id} ({cache_ms}ms)\")\n455\t                return cached_result\n456\t\n457\t        # Try fast-path heuristic routing (bypasses LLM for common patterns)\n458\t        fast_path_start = time.monotonic()\n459\t        fast_path_result = FastPathRouter.try_fast_path(utterance, session_id)\n460\t        if fast_path_result is not None:\n461\t            fast_path_ms = int((time.monotonic() - fast_path_start) * 1000)\n462\t            logger.info(f\"Fast-path routing succeeded for session {session_id} ({fast_path_ms}ms)\")\n463\t            # Cache the fast-path result\n464\t            if use_cache:\n465\t                cache = get_router_cache()\n466\t                cache.put(utterance, session_id, fast_path_result)\n467\t            return fast_path_result\n468\t\n469\t        client = await self._get_zai_client()\n470\t\n471\t        # Build user message with session context if available\n472\t        # IMPORTANT: Session context fetch is now skipped entirely for latency.\n473\t        # Recent intent context provides minimal routing value and costs 2-10ms per call.\n474\t        # The prompt already includes project patterns and intent definitions.\n475\t        # Re-enable only if routing accuracy degrades in production.\n476\t        session_context = \"\"  # Disabled for latency optimization (adc-25sn9)\n477\t\n478\t        user_message = f\"Classify this utterance:\\n\\n{utterance}{session_context}\"\n479\t\n480\t        logger.info(f\"Classifying utterance for session {session_id}\")\n481\t\n482\t        # Build system prompt per call from prompts/router.md (+ urgency rules),\n483\t        # so edits to either prompt take effect without a server restart.\n484\t        system_prompt = self._build_system_prompt()\n485\t\n486\t        # Track retry attempt for malformed JSON\n487\t        retry_count = 0\n488\t        raw_response = None\n489\t\n490\t        try:\n491\t            llm_start = time.monotonic()\n492\t            response = await client.call_simple(\n493\t                system_prompt=system_prompt,\n494\t                user_message=user_message,\n495\t                model=ModelClass.HAIKU.value,  # Use Haiku for faster routing (optimized for classification)\n496\t                max_tokens=256,  # Reduced from 512 - router outputs are small JSON arrays; 256 is sufficient\n497\t                temperature=0.3,  # Lower temperature for consistent classification\n498\t            )\n499\t            llm_ms = int((time.monotonic() - llm_start) * 1000)\n500\t            logger.info(f\"Router LLM call took {llm_ms}ms for session {session_id}\")\n501\t\n502\t            # Store raw response for error reporting\n503\t            raw_response = response\n504\t\n505\t            # Strip markdown code fences if present (ZAI proxy wraps in ```json...```)\n506\t            raw = response.strip()\n507\t            if raw.startswith(\"```\"):\n508\t                raw = raw.split(\"\\n\", 1)[-1]\n509\t                raw = raw.rsplit(\"```\", 1)[0].strip()\n510\t\n511\t            # Parse JSON response\n512\t            intents_data = json.loads(raw)\n513\t            classifications = []\n514\t\n515\t            for intent_data in intents_data:\n516\t                # Map string to IntentType enum\n517\t                intent_type_str = intent_data.get(\"intent_type\", \"status\")\n518\t                try:\n519\t                    intent_type = IntentType(intent_type_str)\n520\t                except ValueError:\n521\t                    logger.warning(f\"Unknown intent type: {intent_type_str}\")\n522\t                    intent_type = IntentType.STATUS\n523\t\n524\t                classification = IntentClassification(\n525\t                    intent_type=intent_type,\n526\t                    project_slug=intent_data.get(\"project_slug\"),\n527\t                    confidence=float(intent_data.get(\"confidence\", 0.8)),\n528\t                    utterance_fragment=intent_data.get(\"utterance_fragment\", utterance),\n529\t                    reasoning=intent_data.get(\"reasoning\", \"\"),\n530\t                    urgency=intent_data.get(\"urgency\", \"normal\"),\n531\t                    lookup_kind=intent_data.get(\"lookup_kind\") if intent_type == IntentType.LOOKUP else None,\n532\t                )\n533\t                classifications.append(classification)\n534\t\n535\t            logger.info(f\"Classified {len(classifications)} intents from utterance\")\n536\t\n537\t            total_ms = int((time.monotonic() - classify_start) * 1000)\n538\t            logger.info(f\"Router classify_utterance total: {total_ms}ms (LLM: {llm_ms}ms)\")\n539\t\n540\t            # Cache the result for future calls\n541\t            if use_cache:\n542\t                cache = get_router_cache()\n543\t                cache.put(utterance, session_id, classifications)\n544\t\n545\t            return classifications\n546\t\n547\t        except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n548\t            logger.error(f\"Failed to parse router response as JSON: {e}\")\n549\t\n550\t            # Implement one corrective retry on malformed JSON\n551\t            if retry_on_malformed and retry_count == 0:\n552\t                logger.info(\"Malformed JSON detected, attempting corrective retry...\")\n553\t                retry_count += 1\n554\t                try:\n555\t                    # Retry once with same parameters\n556\t                    return await self.classify_utterance(\n557\t                        utterance=utterance,\n558\t                        session_id=session_id,\n559\t                        retry_on_malformed=False,  # Prevent infinite retry\n560\t                    )\n561\t                except json.JSONDecode as retry_e:\n562\t                    # Retry also failed - raise RouterMalformedError\n563\t                    raise RouterMalformedError(\n564\t                        parse_error=str(e),\n565\t                        raw_output=raw_response or \"\",\n566\t                        retry_count=retry_count,\n567\t                    ) from retry_e\n568\t\n569\t            # No retry or retry failed - raise RouterMalformedError\n570\t            raise RouterMalformedError(\n571\t                parse_error=str(e),\n572\t                raw_output=raw_response or \"\",\n573\t                retry_count=retry_count,\n574\t            ) from e\n575\t\n576\t        except (LLMTimeoutError, asyncio.TimeoutError) as e:\n577\t            logger.error(f\"Router LLM call timed out: {e}\")\n578\t            raise RouterTimeoutError(f\"Router LLM call timed out: {e}\") from e\n579\t\n580\t        except (LLMRateLimitError,) as e:\n581\t            logger.error(f\"Router LLM call quota exhausted: {e}\")\n582\t            raise RouterQuotaError(f\"Router LLM call quota exhausted: {e}\") from e\n583\t\n584\t        except (LLMError, httpx.HTTPError) as e:\n585\t            logger.error(f\"Router LLM proxy unreachable: {e}\")\n586\t            raise RouterProxyError(f\"Router LLM proxy unreachable: {e}\") from e\n587\t\n588\t        except Exception as e:\n589\t            logger.error(f\"Classification failed with unexpected error: {e}\")\n590\t            # Wrap unknown errors as RouterProxyError for graceful degradation\n591\t            raise RouterProxyError(f\"Router LLM call failed: {e}\") from e\n592\t\n593\t    async def route_utterance(\n594\t        self,\n595\t        utterance: str,\n596\t        utterance_id: str,\n597\t        session_id: str,\n598\t    ) -> list[RoutedIntent]:\n599\t        \"\"\"\n600\t        Route an utterance to appropriate strands.\n601\t\n602\t        Classifies the utterance and routes each intent to the correct strand.\n603\t\n604\t        Args:\n605\t            utterance: The user utterance\n606\t            utterance_id: Unique ID for this utterance\n607\t            session_id: Session ID\n608\t\n609\t        Returns:\n610\t            List of RoutedIntent objects\n611\t\n612\t        Raises:\n613\t            RouterError: If router fails and broadcasts error event\n614\t        \"\"\"\n615\t        # Generate a fallback intent_id for error reporting\n616\t        error_intent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())\n617\t\n618\t        try:\n619\t            # Classify the utterance (one LLM call per utterance — the router stage\n620\t            # is shared across every intent thread it produces, so its duration is\n621\t            # measured once here and stamped onto each RoutedIntent).\n622\t            classify_start = time.monotonic()\n623\t            classifications = await self.classify_utterance(utterance, session_id)\n624\t            router_ms = int((time.monotonic() - classify_start) * 1000)\n625\t\n626\t            routed_intents = []\n627\t            for classification in classifications:\n628\t                # Create intent ID\n629\t                intent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())\n630\t\n631\t                routed_intent = RoutedIntent(\n632\t                    intent_id=intent_id,\n633\t                    classification=classification,\n634\t                    session_id=session_id,\n635\t                    utterance=classification.utterance_fragment,\n636\t                    router_ms=router_ms,\n637\t                )\n638\t                routed_intents.append(routed_intent)\n639\t\n640\t            return routed_intents\n641\t\n642\t        except RouterMalformedError as e:\n643\t            # Malformed JSON after corrective retry - broadcast clarification card\n644\t            logger.error(f\"Router malformed after retry: {e.parse_error}\")\n645\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n646\t            await handler.broadcast_clarification_card(\n647\t                utterance=utterance,\n648\t                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n649\t                session_id=session_id,\n650\t                parse_error=e.parse_error,\n651\t                retry_count=e.retry_count,\n652\t                raw_output_snippet=e.raw_output[:200] if e.raw_output else None,\n653\t            )\n654\t            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n655\t\n656\t        except RouterTimeoutError as e:\n657\t            # Router LLM timeout - broadcast router_unavailable\n658\t            logger.error(f\"Router timeout: {e}\")\n659\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n660\t            await handler.broadcast_router_unavailable(\n661\t                utterance=utterance,\n662\t                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n663\t                session_id=session_id,\n664\t                error_reason=\"timeout\",\n665\t            )\n666\t            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n667\t\n668\t        except RouterQuotaError as e:\n669\t            # Router quota exhausted - broadcast router_unavailable\n670\t            logger.error(f\"Router quota exhausted: {e}\")\n671\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n672\t            await handler.broadcast_router_unavailable(\n673\t                utterance=utterance,\n674\t                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n675\t                session_id=session_id,\n676\t                error_reason=\"quota_exhausted\",\n677\t            )\n678\t            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n679\t\n680\t        except RouterProxyError as e:\n681\t            # Router proxy unreachable - broadcast router_unavailable\n682\t            logger.error(f\"Router proxy error: {e}\")\n683\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n684\t            await handler.broadcast_router_unavailable(\n685\t                utterance=utterance,\n686\t                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n687\t                session_id=session_id,\n688\t                error_reason=\"proxy_down\",\n689\t            )\n690\t            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n691\t\n692\t    async def process_intent(\n693\t        self,\n694\t        routed_intent: RoutedIntent,\n695\t    ) -> dict:\n696\t        \"\"\"\n697\t        Process a routed intent by dispatching to the appropriate strand.\n698\t\n699\t        Args:\n700\t            routed_intent: The routed intent to process\n701\t\n702\t        Returns:\n703\t            Result dictionary with status and data\n704\t        \"\"\"\n705\t        classification = routed_intent.classification\n706\t\n707\t        # Capture per-stage timings for this dispatch and persist one\n708\t        # dispatch_timings row (see Latency Budget & Instrumentation). Each\n709\t        # branch records the stages it measures; router_ms is shared across\n710\t        # the utterance's threads and was stamped on the RoutedIntent. Capture\n711\t        # is non-fatal: a persistence failure logs and moves on, never breaking\n712\t        # the dispatch itself.\n713\t        timings = DispatchTimings()\n714\t        timings.record(\"router_ms\", routed_intent.router_ms)\n715\t\n716\t        # Honesty guards for unimplemented intents\n717\t        if classification.intent_type == IntentType.ACTION:\n718\t            # Action executor is NOT BUILT — broadcast design-only card\n719\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n720\t            await handler.broadcast_action_design_only(\n721\t                utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n722\t                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n723\t                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n724\t                project_slug=classification.project_slug,\n725\t            )\n726\t\n727\t            # Update intent status to reflect the design-only state\n728\t            store = await self._get_store()\n729\t            await store.update_intent_status(\n730\t                routed_intent.intent_id,\n731\t                \"resolved\",\n732\t                \"Action execution is design-only — executor not built\",\n733\t            )\n734\t\n735\t            return {\n736\t                \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n737\t                \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n738\t                \"status\": \"design_only\",\n739\t                \"message\": \"Action execution is not yet available\",\n740\t            }\n741\t\n742\t        if classification.intent_type == IntentType.REMINDER:\n743\t            # Reminders are NOT YET IMPLEMENTED — broadcast clarification card\n744\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n745\t            await handler.broadcast_reminder_unavailable(\n746\t                utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n747\t                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n748\t                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n749\t            )\n750\t\n751\t            # Update intent status to reflect that reminders are unavailable\n752\t            store = await self._get_store()\n753\t            await store.update_intent_status(\n754\t                routed_intent.intent_id,\n755\t                \"resolved\",\n756\t                \"Reminders are not available yet\",\n757\t            )\n758\t\n759\t            return {\n760\t                \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n761\t                \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n762\t                \"status\": \"unavailable\",\n763\t                \"message\": \"Reminders are not available yet\",\n764\t            }\n765\t\n766\t        try:\n767\t            # Non-fatal on error.\"\"\"\n787\t        try:\n788\t            store = await self._get_store()\n789\t            await store.record_dispatch_timings(intent_id, **timings.to_fields())\n790\t        except Exception as e:\n791\t            logger.warning(f\"dispatch timings not recorded for {intent_id}: {e}\")\n792\t\n793\t    async def _fetch_and_synthesize(\n794\t        self,\n795\t           # Track first source timing for fetch_first_source_ms metric\n876\t                if first_source_at[0] is None:\n877\t                    first_source_at[0] = timings.clock()\n878\t\n879\t router output (retry {retry_count}): {parse_error}\")\n\n\nclass IntentType(Enum):\n    \"\"\"Intent types that the router can classify.\"\"\"\n    STATUS = \"status\"\n    ACTION = \"action\"\n
